docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY MENDEZ, BLANCA AS TO DEFENDANT RAYTER, MIKHAIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENDEZ, BLANCA AS TO DEFENDANT RAYTER, MIKHAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF HEARING 7/6/21 @ 3:30PM SERVED APR-15-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RAYTER, MIKHAIL
ORDER RE CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW FOR INTERPERTERS FOR BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS A SPANISH INTERPERTER; DEFENDANT REQUESTS A RUSSIAN INTERPERTER.
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE TO PROVIDE FOR A SPANISH INTERPERTER FOR PLAINTIFF AND RUSSIAN INTERPERTER FOR DEFENDANT. CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 9, 2021 AT 3:30 P.M.
ORDER ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE REQUIRED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2021 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO SEP-09-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BLANCA MENDEZ IS PRESENT AND MAKES A REQUEST FOR A SPANISH INTERPERTER. DEFENDANT MIKHAIL RAYTER IS PRESENT AND MAKES A REQUEST FOR A RUSSIAN INTERPERTER. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2021 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO SEP-16-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BLANCA MENDEZ IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PATRICE BINAISA. DEFENDANT MIKHAIL RAYTER IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED RUSSIAN INTERPRETER TATIANA IACONA. WITNESS FOR THE DEFENDANT ASYA RAYTER IS ALSO PRESENT. HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG REQUIRES ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE: THE MILEAGE OF THE TRUCK AT THE TIME MS. MENDEZ TOOK POSSESSION AND THE MILEAGE OF THE TRUCK NOW (CELL PHONE PHOTOS WOULD BE BEST). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF BLANCA MENDEZ IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MONICA HERNANDEZ. DEFENDANT MIKHAIL RAYTER IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED RUSSIAN INTERPRETER TATIANA IACONA. WITNESS FOR THE DEFENDANT ASYA RAYTER IS ALSO PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT, PLAINTIFF PAID $1300 IN OPEN COURT (WHICH INCLUDES THE REPAIR OF THE CATALYTIC CONVERTER) TO THE DEFENDANT, AND THE PLAINTIFF RECEIVED THE PINK SLIP FOR THE TRUCK.. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
